signals.headline: US-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Holding Amid Blockade and Upcoming Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Holding Amid Blockade and Upcoming Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran on April 8, 2026, conditional on the "COMPLETE, IMMEDIATE, and SAFE OPENING" of the Strait of Hormuz, following Iran's 10-point peace proposal, which he called a "workable basis" for negotiations mediated by Pakistan.[1][4]

signals.headline: BOK confirmed rate freeze at **2

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to **2
signals.raw: South Korea's annual inflation rose to **2.2%** in March 2026 from 2.0% in Jan/Feb, below 2.4% forecasts; held at BOK's 2% target earlier but now slightly above amid oil volatility[1][2][4].

signals.headline: IMF announced Apr 14 upward revision to **2
signals.raw:
IMF announced Apr 14 upward revision to **2.5%** 2026 inflation (+0.7pp from Nov 2025 forecast) due to Iran war, while holding GDP steady; markets plunged (KOSPI -6%, won at 1,517/USD)[5][6].  
No confirmed breaking news on general/global **inflation**, **Germany**, or **GDP** announcements resolving prediction markets[1-7].
